changeSet.author: colvir-ms

and.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pg_namespace n WHERE n.nspname = 'sysrms' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pg_type t JOIN pg_namespace n ON t.typnamespace = n.oid WHERE n.nspname = 'sysrms' AND t.typname = 'index_definition' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

changeSet.sql: CREATE TYPE sysrms.index_definition AS ( table_name character varying, column_names character varying[], is_unique boolean, where_clause text, index_name character varying, predicate_match_pattern text );

changeSet.author: colvir-ms

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pg_type t JOIN pg_namespace n ON t.typnamespace = n.oid WHERE n.nspname = 'sysrms' AND t.typname = 'index_definition' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION sysrms.validate_indexes_get_index_info(schema_name text) RETURNS TABLE(schemaname text, tablename text, indexname text, columns text, is_unique boolean, condition text) LANGUAGE sql AS $function$ SELECT n.nspname::text, t.relname::text, c.relname::text, string_agg(a.attname::text, ',' ORDER BY u.ord) AS columns, pi.indisunique, regexp_replace(pg_get_expr(pi.indpred, pi.indrelid), '[()]', '', 'g') AS condition FROM pg_index pi JOIN pg_class c ON c.oid = pi.indexrelid AND c.relkind = 'i' JOIN pg_class t ON t.oid = pi.indrelid AND t.relkind = 'r' JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = t.relnamespace CROSS JOIN LATERAL unnest(pi.indkey) WITH ORDINALITY AS u(attnum, ord) JOIN pg_attribute a ON a.attrelid = t.oid AND a.attnum = u.attnum WHERE n.nspname = schema_name AND a.attnum > 0 AND pi.indisprimary is false GROUP BY n.nspname, t.relname, c.relname, pi.indkey, pi.indisunique, pi.indexrelid, pi.indpred, pi.indrelid; $function$;

changeSet.author: colvir-ms

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pg_proc p JOIN pg_namespace n ON p.pronamespace = n.oid WHERE n.nspname = 'sysrms' AND p.proname = 'validate_indexes_get_index_info' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sysrms.index000validation000audit ( id bigserial PRIMARY KEY, created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT clock_timestamp(), migration_version integer, action_result text NOT NULL, action_detail text NOT NULL, tablename text, indexname text, message text );
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE sysrms.output_index_validation_result( IN p_action_result text, IN p_action_detail text, IN p_tablename text, IN p_indexname text, IN p_message text, IN p_migration_version integer DEFAULT NULL ) LANGUAGE plpgsql AS $procedure$ BEGIN -- SUGGESTION / EXCEPTION: не вставлять повторно при том же action_result + migration_version + action_detail + tablename + indexname -- (без учёта message). IF p_action_result IN ('SUGGESTION', 'EXCEPTION') THEN IF p_action_result = 'SUGGESTION' AND p_tablename IS NOT DISTINCT FROM 'index000validation000audit' THEN RETURN; END IF; IF EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sysrms.index000validation000audit iv_prev WHERE iv_prev.action_result = p_action_result AND iv_prev.action_detail IS NOT DISTINCT FROM p_action_detail AND iv_prev.tablename IS NOT DISTINCT FROM p_tablename AND iv_prev.indexname IS NOT DISTINCT FROM p_indexname AND iv_prev.migration_version IS NOT DISTINCT FROM p_migration_version ) THEN RETURN; END IF; -- INDEX_DROPPED: порядок validate_indexes — сначала сверка с моделью (в т.ч. предложения по "лишним" -- индексам), затем снятие дубликатов. Индекс, удалённый как дубликат, уже отсутствует в БД; -- ранее записанное по нему SUGGESTION (например ручной DROP) теряет смысл — удаляем такие строки. ELSIF p_action_result = 'INDEX_DROPPED' THEN DELETE FROM sysrms.index000validation000audit iv_sug WHERE iv_sug.action_result = 'SUGGESTION' AND iv_sug.tablename IS NOT DISTINCT FROM p_tablename AND iv_sug.indexname IS NOT DISTINCT FROM p_indexname AND iv_sug.migration_version IS NOT DISTINCT FROM p_migration_version; END IF; INSERT INTO sysrms.index000validation000audit ( migration_version, action_result, action_detail, tablename, indexname, message ) VALUES ( p_migration_version, p_action_result, p_action_detail, p_tablename, p_indexname, p_message ); END; $procedure$;

changeSet.author: colvir-ms

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pg_proc p JOIN pg_namespace n ON p.pronamespace = n.oid WHERE n.nspname = 'sysrms' AND p.proname = 'output_index_validation_result' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

changeSet.author: colvir-ms

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pg_proc p JOIN pg_namespace n ON p.pronamespace = n.oid WHERE n.nspname = 'sysrms' AND p.proname = 'output_index_validation_result' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
